description: You are the operations manager at The Copper Kettle Bistro, a 65-seat casual dining restaurant. Food costs have been creeping above the 30% target and you need to perform a complete menu engineering analysis before the seasonal menu refresh. Using the source data in ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/recipe_cost_cards.csv and pos_sales_4weeks.csv, create a comprehensive menu engineering analysis workbook saved as ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/menu_engineering_analysis.xlsx. The workbook must include per-item food cost percentages, contribution margins, and total quantities sold aggregated from the 4-week POS data. Classify every item using the Kasavana-Smith Menu Engineering Matrix (Stars, Plowhorses, Puzzles, Dogs) using the average contribution margin and average quantity sold as dividing lines. Include the overall weighted food cost percentage and organize the workbook with a professional multi-sheet structure featuring summary statistics and category breakdowns.
